failures.description: The agent selected the more expensive smartphone from the tool results instead of the cheapest one.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Smartphone. The tool call at index 3 returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99, then item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as item 1507389580 at $1157.86, which contradicts the tool output and ignores the cheaper first result. This is not an invalid invocation, underspecification, or unsupported intent; the needed evidence was available and the failure comes from incorrectly using the tool result.
